allow: PowerShell($py = \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($py\) { python --version }; $uv = \(Get-Command uv -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($uv\) { "uv: $\(uv --version\)" } else { "uv: not found" }; $make = \(Get-Command make -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\); if \($make\) { "make: found" } else { "make: not found" })
